questions.question: Why conventional TnI should not be used alone to diagnose myocardial infarction ?
questions.correct_answer: It may be falsely elevated in other patients with septic shock
wrong_answers: It is elevated in all skeletal muscle diseases
It rises immediately in every patient with chest pain
It is not specific for cardiac injury
